---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# PESCAR

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

## Installation

Install `PESCAR` from GitHub using `pak`:

```{r install, eval=FALSE}
install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("Fred-White94/PESCAR")
```

Then load the package:

```{r load-package, eval=FALSE}
library(PESCAR)
```

## Getting started

A worked simulation tutorial is provided in the repository:

[Simulation tutorial](vignettes/PESCAR_simulation_tutorial.Rmd)

This tutorial introduces the basic workflow for simulating data, fitting a PESCAR model, selecting tuning parameters, and inspecting the model output.
